caption: A man with a white beard, wearing a white Nehru jacket over a light-colored long-sleeved shirt, stands at a wooden podium delivering a speech. He is positioned in front of a textured, green stone wall that features a gold circular emblem and a rectangular doorway in the background. Two microphones are mounted on the podium in front of him. Across the sequence, the man speaks with an animated expression, moving his hands and shifting his body to emphasize his points. The camera angle remains static, capturing him from the waist up as he gestures with his right arm. The lighting is bright and consistent, highlighting the details of his traditional attire and the structured, architectural elements of the room. No on-screen text or logos are visible in the scene.
